author: Edidiong Umoh
name: Sprint 002: Ablation Study — Untied Embeddings + Cross-Hardware Validation
blurb: 27-run ablation matrix (9 configs × 3 seeds) on RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell isolating six architectural components, with headline A6 (untied embeddings) result reproduced on 1×H100 SXM. Best config: TIE_EMBEDDINGS=0, val_bpb=1.3302 (H100), 1.3275 (Blackwell 3-seed mean). Artifact: 12.97 MB int8+zlib under 16 MB cap.
